category_sources: Official README describes banning hosts that cause multiple authentication errors by updating firewall rules.
source_facts.description says Fail2Ban scans log files and bans malicious IPs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is `fail2ban`; official README heading and project site use `Fail2Ban`.
docs_sources: Official README points to the GitHub Wiki, developer documentation on Read the Docs, and the README as documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README describes failed login detection and firewall rule updates.
source_facts.description mentions scanning logs and banning IPs.
